infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The team representative is required to report to the Stewards immediately, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Atlassian Williams F1 Team Document 76 Date 05 July 2026 Time 18:37 Team Atlassian Williams Raci

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The team representative is required to report to the Stewards immediately, in relation to the incident
below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Atlassian Williams F1 Team
Document 76
Date 05 July 2026
Time 18:37
Team Atlassian Williams Racing
Reason Alleged Breach of Article B5.13.4c of the FIA F1 Regulations – unlapping behind the
Safety Car when not entitled to do so. 
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
